Stipulated Motion To Stay Discovery And Pleading Deadlines (First Amended Complaint);
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORPORATION's Stipulated Motion To Stay Discovery And Pleading Deadlines (First Amended Complaint)

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Leighton M. Anderson, Esq. of BEWLEY LASSLEBEN & MILLER LLP, Tel:562.698.9771, for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

There was no appearance by defendant; no hearing was held. However, plaintiff's counsel represented to the court that both parties agree that the order should still be signed.

Order granting the motion was signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Stipulated Motion To Stay Discovery And Deadlines: Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. LEIGHTON M. ANDERSON, Esq. of Bewley Lassleben & Miller LLP (Tel: 562-698-9771) for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. NATASSIA KWAN, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-4272) for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Stipulated Motion To Stay Discovery And Deadlines.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is GRANTED. Parties have been instructed to prepare a new order expressly stating the beginning and end date of the stay, and stating that it is a general stay tolling the time to bring the case to trial.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by the parties.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
